# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless event processing - SNS topic and SQS queue with policy and subscription

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: event-processing-queue
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: event-processing-topic
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Retention period in seconds (60 to 1209600)
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (0 to 43200)

Resources:
  EventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout

  EventTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName

  EventSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref EventTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  EventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSnsPublishToQueue
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventTopic
          - Sid: AllowMessageOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
            Resource: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Value: !Ref EventQueue
  QueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
  TopicArn:
    Value: !Ref EventTopic
